articles.title: Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' orders
articles.summary: Four men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders.

articles.title: More than 5,000 flights cancelled as US east coast digs out of record snow
articles.summary: A major snowstorm dumps more than a foot of snow in several areas, bringing power cuts and disruption.

articles.title: Mexico hunts 23 inmates sprung from jail during wave of violence

articles.title: Guthrie suspect believed to have visited home before she went missing
